SSgt · USAF · TSgt June 2026

Todd R. Hardeman

Principal Systems & Solutions Architect

Operations project manager, systems architect, and full-stack developer with 8+ years leading high-consequence technical missions. Combining military precision with AI/ML innovation to deliver enterprise-level impact — from $116M in cost avoidance to national-level security operations.

🔒 Secret Clearance 2A974 Avionics Full-Stack Dev AI/ML Focus
View Portfolio Get In Touch
01 · About

Who I Am

From aircraft avionics to AI-powered enterprise systems

Staff Sergeant Todd R. Hardeman serves as a lead Software Project Manager and Avionics Technician for the 660th Aircraft Maintenance Squadron at Travis Air Force Base, California. In this capacity, he directs digital transformation initiatives and manages logistics for a multi-billion-dollar aviation fleet.

A premier innovator within Air Mobility Command, Sergeant Hardeman engineered a hardware solution for Large Aircraft Infrared Countermeasures (LAIRCM) systems projected to avoid over $812 million in annual maintenance costs. He also pioneered the first Unmanned Aerial System (UAS) inspection of the C-17 platform, reducing inspection duration by 92% and establishing an enterprise-wide precedent for automated maintenance.

His expeditionary expertise was forged during a 2019 deployment to Al Dhafra Air Base and a 2025 deployment as Lead Systems Specialist, synchronizing global connectivity assets and secure data-link architectures — including Link-16 operations — in support of national-level security objectives.

  • 2025 Gen Larry O. Spencer Innovation Award Nominee
  • 2025 Non-Commissioned Officer of the Year Nominee
  • 2024 Non-Commissioned Officer of the Year (Wing Level / 60 AMW)
  • 2023 Non-Commissioned Officer of the Year (Squadron Level)
  • 2022 Airman of the Year (Wing, Group, & Squadron Level)
  • Air Force Commendation Medal (2023)
  • Air Force Achievement Medal & Good Conduct Medals
$116M Annual Savings Achieved (LAIRCM Plug)
92% Inspection Duration Reduction (UAS C-17)
10K+ Members on Knowledge Platform
8+ Years High-Consequence Operations
179 Aircraft Fleet Protected via Safety Investigation
18 AF General Officers Served (Automated Reporting)
02 · Projects

Portfolio Projects

Eight high-impact initiatives spanning engineering, software, and strategic operations

LAIRCM Inlet/Exhaust Port Plug

P1

Engineered a $25 hardware solution to prevent water ingress in KC-46 infrared countermeasures systems — replacing $887K per-occurrence failures with near-zero cost prevention.

$116M projected annual savings · 370K man-hours recovered annually
Hardware Engineering CAD / 3D Print Cost Avoidance Aviation Systems
View Details →

Mission Ready: Aviation Operations Dashboard

P2

Designed and began development of a full-stack web application for aviation operations — providing real-time aircraft readiness visibility, maintenance tracking, and data management via intuitive UI/UX.

Real-time readiness visibility · Reduced manual reporting · Commander-focused design
Full-Stack Dev UI/UX Design React / Figma Aviation Ops
View Details →

UAS C-17 Inspection Innovation

P3

Pioneered the first Unmanned Aerial System inspection methodology for the C-17 Globemaster III — reducing inspection duration by 92% and establishing an enterprise-wide automated maintenance precedent.

92% inspection time reduction · Enterprise-wide automated maintenance precedent
UAS / Drone Tech Automation Process Innovation Aviation Safety
View Details →

Enterprise Global Knowledge-Sharing Platform

P4

Engineered and implemented a global knowledge-sharing platform utilized by 10 Major Commands and 100 installations — standardizing professional development across 10,000+ personnel.

10 Major Commands · 100 installations · 10K+ members connected
Knowledge Management Enterprise Systems M365 Platform Organizational Dev
View Details →

Intake Application for Administrative Modernization

P5

Co-developed and deployed a custom Power Apps intake application that modernized administrative workflows — automating high-volume request processing and eliminating manual data entry bottlenecks.

Automated enterprise administrative intake · Eliminated manual processing bottlenecks
Power Platform Low-Code Dev Process Automation Digital Transformation
View Details →

Digital Task Tracking Application

P6

Co-developed and deployed a digital task tracking application for military and academic institutions — eliminating training backlogs and streamlining inter-organizational workflow management.

Training backlogs eliminated · Cross-organizational task visibility achieved
Power Platform Task Management Military-Academic Workflow Automation
View Details →

Automated Reporting System for 18th Air Force

P7

Engineered an automated reporting system that increased data accuracy for 18 Air Force general officers — filling a commissioned officer-level senior leadership vacancy through technical innovation.

Served 18 AF General Officers · Filled commissioned officer-level vacancy through automation
Power Platform Business Intelligence Strategic Leadership Automation
View Details →

Strategic Project Management & Counter-Terrorism Support

P8

Managed and synchronized large-scale technical logistics and global connectivity assets for national-level strategic directives — providing critical intelligence support that directly contributed to the interdiction of a narco-terrorist network.

Narco-terrorist network interdiction · National security objectives achieved · Life-saving operational outcomes
Strategic Ops Secure Networking Inter-Agency Counter-Terrorism
View Details →
